ground_truth.title: The latest online learning programs news, videos & comments | NewsBreak
ground_truth.main_content: In 2025, the pace of change in online learning is unlike anything the education sector has ever experienced. From a flexible way for students to learn into a global standard: wherever and whenever you want to study, with us, you get the same high-quality education on online platforms designed for learning at your own pace. 2026 Best Online Programs: Launch Announcement. U.S. News will release the 2026 Best Online Programs rankings on Tuesday, Jan. 27, 2026. For those already planning, this will be one week later than the 2025 edition's release. The rankings continue to focus on midcareer distance learners, and the same set of program areas from last year will be updated. Developing A Diverse Dynamic: Audiology Distance Education Students Learn Together. One of the hardest things in an online program is to build community, according to Shilpi Banerjee, PhD, director of the Distance Education programs in the Osborne Audiology Department on Drexel University, Elkins Park campus. But for the program's most recent cohort, which spent two weeks on campus for face-to-face training, that wasn't the case. Best Online Law Schools Programs 2026. Online and hybrid Juris Doctor (JD) programs continue to grow as more students search for flexible ways to study law. Many working professionals, parents, and career changers want accessible options that fit into their daily lives. Because of these needs, schools across the country have invested in stronger distance-learning systems. As a result, the Best Online Law Schools for 2026 now offer flexibility, accreditation, and practical training that match traditional programs. The BCPS Online Learning Program is accepting applications from families interested in enrolling for the 2026-2027 school year. The program is only open to students who will be entering Grades 5-12 next school year. The application deadline is Friday, December 12. Visit https://elearning.bcps.org/ to learn more about the program.
